summary: Implemented trigger-based agency planning, removed old agency-loop terminology from live KB/source/docs, and removed queue.json generation so graph state owns derived queue order.

checks_run.name: grep live KB/source/docs for old agency-loop/tool-name terms
checks_run.note: No matches in README.md, skills, .codewiki/kb, extensions/codewiki/src, scripts/smoke-test.mjs, or TASK-038 task file.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Agency trigger names align with task-end, sprint-end, roadmap-end, and budget-end events.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: AGENCY_TRIGGER_VALUES includes manual, task_end, sprint_end, roadmap_end, budget_end; planAgency maps triggers to bounded modes and actions.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Each trigger maps to bounded observe/maintain/work behavior with explicit budgets and stop conditions.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: agency.ts budgetForMode and resolveModeAndTrigger map triggers to mode and maxWrites/maxCycles/maxWallSeconds/risk; returned stop objects include condition/reason/completed.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: OpenClaw-derived agency-loop terminology is removed from live KB/source/docs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Files renamed to agency.ts; types/schema/tool names changed to Agency/codewiki_agency; grep over live KB/source/docs finds no old agency-loop/tool-name terms refs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: queue.json is removed because graph owns derived queue order.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: codewiki-rebuilder no longer writes queue.json; queue file deleted; rebuild does not recreate it; graph/roadmap KB docs clarify boundary.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Pi-facing agency entrypoint routes through application/API semantics.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: adapters/pi/index.ts registers codewiki_agency using codewikiAgencyToolInputSchema and executeCodewikiAgency; adapter delegates to application planAgency.

validation_verdict.rationale: Accepted terminology/queue decisions are reflected in feedback build, documentation build, KB, roadmap TASK-038, source, tests, and generated graph. Checks pass.

unresolved_issues: Historical builds, archived tasks, and old release checkpoints may retain old agency-loop wording as history. Live KB/source/docs do not.

publication.recommended_commit_title: refactor(agency): replace old agency-loop terminology and remove queue lens
publication.recommended_commit_body:
Replace OpenClaw-derived agency-loop terminology with agency across live KB, source, skills, README, tests, and TASK-038. Rename the planning use case/tool to planAgency/codewiki_agency, add agency trigger schema, update status state agency lanes, and stop generating .codewiki/roadmap/queue.json because graph state owns derived queue order.

Checks: tsc, architecture, npm test, graph rebuild, queue absence, live agency grep.
